title: Alignment / Misalignment
html: Stub. Yahir's recurring relationship-evaluation frame — explicit two-column ledger of Alignments vs Misalignments applied to a partner. The pattern surfaces across the Emily arc: the March 4 cons list (one-sided), the March 24 explicit ledger (Misalignments populated, Alignments header blank), and the April 4 drowning entry ("my relationship with emily seems to probably be coming to a close"). The frame's structural tell: when only one column gets written, the decision has already been made.

related.label: Cons / I don't like — relationship-critique list (likely Emily)
I'm drowning a bit — April 4 journal entry (Rankett treadmill, Emily ending, dad as cook)
